title: DLS-Lead Component Manifest v1
description: Machine-readable manifest for a DLS-Lead component. Generated by /build-manifest, validated before commit.

kebabName.description: Kebab-case name used in CSS classes, token namespaces, and file paths.

category.description: Primary category from the spec, e.g. 'layout / disclosure', 'action', 'modal / overlay'.

subcategory.description: Optional secondary category for finer grouping.

description.description: One-line description of what the component does and when to use it.

subComponents.description: Other component names exported from the same file (e.g. Accordion exports AccordionItem).

variants.description: Variant values exposed via data-variant (e.g. ['filled','outline','ghost']). Empty array if none.

intents.description: Intent values exposed via data-intent (e.g. ['neutral','primary','danger']). Empty array if none.

sizes.description: Size values exposed via data-size (e.g. ['s','m']). Empty array if none.

props.description: All React props from the component's Props interface, in declaration order.

tokens.description: CSS custom property names used by this component. Must exist in tokens.json.

states.description: Interactive state model for the component.

implementation.description: Which state technique the component uses. 'oklch-shift' = OKLCH L-delta, 'overlay' = rgba overlay tokens, 'hybrid' = both depending on variant, 'none' = no interactive color states.

rationale.description: Why this implementation was chosen (e.g. 'Filled surfaces use OKLCH for perceptual uniformity').

available.description: CSS pseudo-states and data-attributes the component responds to.

tokens.description: State-specific tokens (L3 --dls-state-*, component-scoped color tokens, or component-scoped focus shadow tokens).

composition.description: Rules for how this component composes with others.

allowedChildren.description: Component names that may appear as direct children.

forbiddenChildren.description: Component names that must NOT appear as children.

forbiddenParents.description: Component names that must NOT wrap this component.

minItems.description: Minimum number of child items for the component to be meaningful.

recommendedItems.description: Recommended number of child items for typical usage.

semanticElement.description: The HTML element or ARIA role at the root (e.g. 'button', 'dialog', 'div[role=region]').

requiredAria.description: ARIA attributes the component must set (e.g. ['aria-expanded', 'aria-controls']).

respectsReducedMotion.description: Whether the component disables/reduces animations under prefers-reduced-motion.

focusManagement.description: How focus is managed (e.g. 'roving tabindex', 'focus trap', 'natural tab order').

figma.description: Figma design metadata and property mapping.

componentSetUrl.description: Full Figma URL to the component set.

propertyMapping.description: Row-for-row mapping between Figma properties and React props.

componentSets.description: Optional list of Figma component sets when one React component maps to multiple Figma sets.

useWhen.description: Guidance on when to choose this component.

doNotUseFor.description: Anti-patterns — situations where this component is the wrong choice.

deprecated.description: Present only when the component is deprecated. Omit entirely for active components.

knownDeviations.description: Documented gaps between the code and the ideal system rules.

_meta.description: Generation metadata. Written by the tool, not hand-edited.

sourceHash.description: First 16 hex chars of SHA-256 over (TSX + stories + CSS + spec + tokens.json).

name.description: Prop name exactly as declared in the Props interface.

required.description: True if the prop has no '?' modifier and no default value.

default.description: Default value from destructuring, if any. Omit if none.

enum.description: For union-literal types, the individual values.

description.description: JSDoc comment on the prop, if present.

figmaProperty.description: Property name as shown in Figma (e.g. 'Show icon', 'State').

reactProp.description: Matching React prop name, or null if no code counterpart.

valueMapping.description: Optional map of Figma value → React value when they differ.

note.description: Explanation when reactProp is null or the mapping is non-obvious.

componentSetUrl.description: Full Figma URL to the component set.

propertyMapping.description: Property mapping scoped to this component set.

area.description: Which rule or area is deviated from (e.g. 'icon-source', 'token-layer').

description.description: What the deviation is and why it exists.

since.description: ISO 8601 date when the component was deprecated (e.g. '2026-07-01').

replacement.description: PascalCase name of the replacement component, or null if removed without replacement.

reason.description: Why the component is deprecated (e.g. 'Merged into DialogContent', 'Replaced by Card with data-variant="summary"').

migrationGuide.description: Brief migration instructions or a relative path to a migration doc (e.g. 'Replace <OldName> with <NewName replacement={true}>' or 'docs/migrations/old-name-to-new-name.md').

removeAfter.description: ISO 8601 date after which the component may be removed from the codebase. Gives consumers a hard deadline.

codemod.description: Path to a jscodeshift codemod script that automates the migration, or null if no codemod exists yet.
